title: Ethical Shopping Assistant
problem_or_desire: Difficulty verifying the sustainability claims of consumer brands.
core_concept: A browser-integrated web app that displays sustainability scores while shopping.
proposed_approach: A web dashboard that allows users to search brands and view aggregated data on labor practices and environmental impact.
prototype_scope: A search bar that returns a pre-populated sustainability score for 50 common retail brands.

title: Recruitment Sourcing Filter
problem_or_desire: Identifying stealth, passive candidate sentiment signals before they actively enter the job market.
core_concept: Autonomous social reading and contribution analysis, focused solely on long-form public content authored by candidates.
proposed_approach: Ranking candidate 'mindshare' via analysis of high-depth technical content production on community forums as opposed to resumes.
prototype_scope: Limited to scraping and grading public contribution histories for one job description on one coding community forum.

title: Cloud Scribes
target_user: Visual artists seeking cooperative abstract outlet
problem_or_desire: Digital art being solitary by design
core_concept: Cooperative drawing tool with forced constraints.
proposed_approach: A drawing app where two users must coordinate to create a single image, with one controlling line and the other controlling color.
prototype_scope: A two-user concurrent drawing interface demonstrating basic synchronization logic for one shared layer. | Implement basic drawing canvas; Build simple networking for two-user sync; Define line and color control roles

title: Echo Archive
target_user: History buffs and collaborative world builders
problem_or_desire: Disconnected storytelling platforms for regional historical facts
core_concept: GPS-located audio logs left by 'Ghosts' that require movement to a specific real-world coordinate to initiate narration.
proposed_approach: Location-based point-to-point traversal gameplay that overlays a local-history ghost narrative onto modern landscapes.
prototype_scope: Single city square map supporting one tethered narrative mission.

title: Legal Workflow Traffic Controller
problem_or_desire: Uncontrolled document version chaos across external law firms.
core_concept: Automated enforcement of folder structures and naming conventions for shared documents.
proposed_approach: A script that monitors a local or cloud-synced folder and alerts users when files violate naming or structural conventions.
prototype_scope: A folder-watcher service that scans a specific directory and generates a report of non-compliant files. | Define naming/structure rules; Implement file system watcher; Build compliance checker; Create alert/reporting mechanism

title: Coffee Equipment Rental Library
problem_or_desire: High cost of entry for professional-grade brewing equipment
core_concept: A rental service for high-end espresso machines and grinders on a monthly basis
proposed_approach: Inventory management and maintenance of high-end machines for short-term rental
prototype_scope: A library of 5 machines available for rent to local users

title: Community Kitchen Incubator
problem_or_desire: High barrier to entry for commercial kitchen space and licensing.
core_concept: A shared-use kitchen facility that handles all health department compliance and insurance for members.
proposed_approach: Provide hourly kitchen rentals bundled with administrative support for food safety certification.
prototype_scope: A pilot program with three food entrepreneurs sharing one kitchen space for one month.

title: The Community Preservative Co-op
problem_or_desire: Waste of fresh aromatics and stock perishables leading to lost inventory and cooking motivation
core_concept: A distributed subscription for dehydration/freezing labor as an utility
proposed_approach: Rotating service where home users get a pick-up that returns their raw grocery goods to them refined into flavor concentrates/freezer portions
prototype_scope: Ten bags processed for local home users over one pilot week including simple inventory storage tagging

title: Shadow Script
problem_or_desire: Stalled imagination due to lack of character stakes
core_concept: A 'reverse Choose-Your-Own-Adventure' where the player constructs the obstacle/protagonist and then attempts to break the story outcome for a sidekick AI.
proposed_approach: Utilize prompt-input dynamics where user-led conflicts dictate probability curves that the machine tries to solve during session rounds.
prototype_scope: Two scripted chapters defining the protagonist and one 'conflict injection' scene test.

title: RepairRiddle
problem_or_desire: Vetting the legitimacy and relevancy of massive amounts of instructional media
core_concept: Annotation map on procedural image slices identifying likely trouble spots within the manufacturer schematics
proposed_approach: Guided hotspot selection overlaid on visual guides supplied to identify broken components visually
prototype_scope: Interaction of an exploded parts-view image enabling users to pin suspected common failure point warnings
